stemHtml: Which of the following accurately describes the legislation output from EASA?

options.a: Unique structure of soft law (regulations, delegated acts, implementing acts, implementing rules) and hard law (certification specifications, acceptable means of compliance and guidance material)
options.b: Unique structure of hard law (regulations, delegated acts, implementing acts, implementing rules) and soft law (certification specifications, acceptable means of compliance and guidance material)
options.d: Special guidance materials and regulations that harmonize and facilitate the regulatory structure of the agency
